home.hero_title: Citizens & Authority: Bridging the Gap of Trust
home.hero_subtitle: India's first multi-agent civic intelligence platform. Report local infrastructure damage, automate routing to departments, and track verified resolutions in real time.
home.how_subtitle: A transparent, multi-agent AI pipeline driving public infrastructure resolution.
home.step1_desc: Pin coordinates on the map and upload a photo of the damaged infrastructure.
home.step2_desc: Vision agents check photo validity, identify damage severity, and filter spam.
home.step3_desc: Routing agents assign issues to PWD, Jal Shakti, or DISCOM with strict SLA deadlines.
home.step4_desc: Resolutions are verified via before/after photos and on-site GPS telemetry checks.
home.stats_subtitle: Real-time metrics aggregated directly from database audits.
home.recent_subtitle: Latest community updates and automated agent actions.
